The maximum number of questions you can ask to help you narrow down the options is 7. Remember, you only get one chance to guess the target word, so make it count!

The target word is "Millipede". The question is "Does it have 6 legs?"

Millipedes do not have 6 legs. They have many legs - typically dozens to hundreds of legs. The name "millipede" means "thousand feet" though they don't actually have a thousand legs, but they do have many more than 6 legs.
